Ocean Drive boutique hotel in South Beach offering meeting and event venues and wedding spaces alongside LT Steak & Seafood dining.
Iconic oceanfront Collins Avenue resort, originally designed by Morris Lapidus, offering extensive ballroom and conference event facilities.

Doral hotel with three meeting rooms, including the El Gran Salon, offering flexible event space for weddings, conferences and celebrations.
